item: 定语从句：[句子] + 的 + 名词
example sentence 1: The person who called me yesterday is my teacher.
chinese sentence 1: 昨天给我打电话的人是我的老师。

example sentence 1: The student who solved the problem explained it to the class.
chinese sentence 1: 解出那道题的学生向全班解释了答案。

example sentence 1: He spoke so clearly that everyone understood.
chinese sentence 1: 他说得很清楚，大家都听懂了。

example sentence 1: The weather became so cold that the river froze.
chinese sentence 1: 天气冷到河水都结冰了。

example sentence 1: I can understand this article, but I cannot understand that report.
chinese sentence 1: 这篇文章我看得懂，但是那份报告我看不懂。

example sentence 1: If you finish early, then send me the file.
chinese sentence 1: 如果你早点做完，就把文件发给我。

example sentence 1: After the meeting ends, we will discuss the plan.
chinese sentence 1: 会议结束以后，我们会讨论这个计划。

example sentence 1: Only after he apologized did she forgive him.
chinese sentence 1: 他道歉以后，她才原谅他。
example sentence 2: Only after finishing the report did he relax.
chinese sentence 2: 他写完报告以后，才放松下来。
example sentence 3: She did not understand the joke until he explained it.
chinese sentence 3: 老师解释以后，她才明白这个笑话。
example sentence 4: Only when the teacher arrived did the class become quiet.
chinese sentence 4: 老师来了以后，教室才安静下来。

example sentence 1: Please put the book on the table.
chinese sentence 1: 请把书放在桌子上。

example sentence 1: The window was broken by the strong wind.
chinese sentence 1: 窗户被大风吹破了。

example sentence 1: He goes to work at nine, but he starts working at ten.
chinese sentence 1: 他九点去上班，但是十点才开始工作。

example sentence 1: This answer is not accurate, and it is not complete either.
chinese sentence 1: 这个答案并不准确，也不完整。

example sentence 1: If we call this a success, it is only a small success.
chinese sentence 1: 如果说这是成功的话，也只是一个小小的成功。

example sentence 1: If we must choose one reason, I think time is the biggest issue.
chinese sentence 1: 如果要说一个原因，我觉得时间是最大的问题。

item: 和 / 跟…有什么不一样
example sentence 1: What is the difference between this method and that method?
chinese sentence 1: 这个方法和那个方法有什么不一样？

example sentence 1: For beginners, this explanation is easier to understand.
chinese sentence 1: 对初学者来说，这个解释更容易理解。

example sentence 1: When I heard the news, I could not help laughing.
chinese sentence 1: 听到这个消息，我不由得笑了。
example sentence 2: Seeing the old photo, she could not help crying.
chinese sentence 2: 看到那张旧照片，她不由得哭了。
example sentence 3: After hearing his story, I could not help admiring him.
chinese sentence 3: 听完他的故事，我不由得佩服他。
example sentence 4: When everyone laughed, he could not help smiling too.
chinese sentence 4: 大家都笑了，他也不由得笑了起来。

example sentence 1: Maybe he will change his mind tomorrow.
chinese sentence 1: 说不定他明天会改变主意。
example sentence 2: Maybe we will meet him at the station.
chinese sentence 2: 说不定我们会在车站遇到他。
example sentence 3: Perhaps the answer is simpler than we think.
chinese sentence 3: 说不定答案比我们想的简单。
example sentence 4: Maybe she has already left the office.
chinese sentence 4: 说不定她已经离开办公室了。

example sentence 1: This soup is a little salty.
chinese sentence 1: 这碗汤有点咸。
example sentence 2: This room is a little too dark.
chinese sentence 2: 这个房间有点太暗。
example sentence 3: I feel a bit nervous before the interview.
example sentence 4: The explanation is a little difficult to follow.
chinese sentence 4: 这个解释有点难懂。

example sentence 1: It is only a temporary solution.
chinese sentence 1: 这也只是一个临时的办法。
example sentence 2: It is only a suggestion, not a final decision.
chinese sentence 2: 这也只是一个建议，不是最后的决定。

chinese sentence 3: 他的成功也只是这个项目的开始。
example sentence 4: This is only one possible reason.
chinese sentence 4: 这也只是其中一个可能的原因。

example sentence 1: The real problem is that nobody wants to take responsibility.
chinese sentence 1: 真正的问题那就是没有人愿意负责。
example sentence 2: The main problem is that we do not have enough time.
chinese sentence 2: 主要的问题那就是我们没有足够的时间。
example sentence 3: My suggestion is that we start again tomorrow.
chinese sentence 3: 我的建议那就是明天重新开始。
example sentence 4: The reason is that nobody checked the details.
chinese sentence 4: 原因那就是没有人检查细节。

example sentence 1: He is waiting for you at the library.
chinese sentence 1: 他在图书馆等你。

example sentence 1: When I was studying abroad, I met many kind people.
chinese sentence 1: 我在国外学习的时候，遇到了很多善良的人。

example sentence 1: The school is in Singapore, in the western part of the city.
chinese sentence 1: 这所学校在新加坡的西部。

example sentence 1: As for this plan, I think it needs more time.
chinese sentence 1: 这个计划，我觉得还需要更多时间。

example sentence 1: He waited until midnight before going home.
chinese sentence 1: 他一直等到半夜才回家。

example sentence 1: A stranger suddenly appeared at the door.
chinese sentence 1: 门口突然出现了一个陌生人。
example sentence 2: A new problem suddenly appeared during the test.
chinese sentence 2: 测试时突然出现了一个新问题。
example sentence 3: A strange sound suddenly appeared outside the room.
chinese sentence 3: 房间外面突然出现了奇怪的声音。
example sentence 4: An error suddenly appeared on the screen.
chinese sentence 4: 屏幕上突然出现了一个错误。

example sentence 1: She listened to the music while feeling relaxed.
chinese sentence 1: 她听着音乐，觉得很放松。

example sentence 1: I had not even had time to explain before he left.
chinese sentence 1: 我还没来得及解释，他就走了。

example sentence 1: The small company gradually became a large organization.
chinese sentence 1: 那家小公司慢慢从小公司变成了大机构。

example sentence 1: Old methods were replaced by new technology.
chinese sentence 1: 旧方法被新技术取代了。

example sentence 1: She sings like a professional singer.
chinese sentence 1: 她唱歌像专业歌手一样。

example sentence 1: It seemed as if time had stopped.
chinese sentence 1: 时间仿佛停止了。

item: 看见 / 听见 + 宾语 + 动作
example sentence 1: I saw him walk into the classroom.
chinese sentence 1: 我看见他走进教室。

example sentence 1: This clue led the police to the truth.
chinese sentence 1: 这条线索把警察引向了真相。

example sentence 1: There stood a tall guard at the entrance.
chinese sentence 1: 入口那里站着一名高大的警卫。

example sentence 1: There is a small cafe beside the station.
chinese sentence 1: 车站旁边那里有一家小咖啡馆。

example sentence 1: Even my younger brother can solve this problem.
chinese sentence 1: 连我弟弟都能解出这道题。

example sentence 1: Not only the students, even the teachers were surprised.
chinese sentence 1: 不只是学生，连老师也很惊讶。

example sentence 1: He seems to know the answer already.
chinese sentence 1: 他似乎已经知道答案了。
example sentence 2: He seems to be hiding something.
chinese sentence 2: 他似乎在隐瞒什么。
example sentence 3: This method seems to work better.
example sentence 4: She seems to have misunderstood the question.
chinese sentence 4: 她似乎误会了这个问题。

example sentence 1: It looks like it is going to rain.
chinese sentence 1: 好像快要下雨了。
example sentence 2: It looks as if he has already heard the news.
chinese sentence 2: 他好像已经听说这个消息了。
example sentence 3: She seems like she is waiting for someone.

example sentence 1: This plan looks very practical.

chinese sentence 2: 这个问题看起来简单，其实不简单。
example sentence 3: He looks very tired today.

example sentence 1: She listened to music while doing homework.
chinese sentence 1: 她一边听音乐，一边做作业。

example sentence 1: He stopped halfway through his sentence.

example sentence 1: They tried to solve the problem peacefully.

example sentence 1: The movie was so touching that many people cried.
chinese sentence 1: 这部电影太感人，以至于很多人都哭了。

example sentence 1: He was so tired that he could not walk anymore.

chinese sentence 1: 如果这是错误的话，我们应该马上改正。
